title: Enchantable Food
description: Adds in 2 food enchantments, 1 cursed food enchantment, and a balanced crafting recipe for enchanted golden apples.
body:
This datapack lets you enchant your food with two new enchantments and one new curse. It also adds in an additional crafting recipe for the enchanted golden apple which is more balanced than the old recipe.

### Enchantments

<details>
<summary>😋 Fullness</summary>
Adds one second of saturation when you consume most higher tier food.

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe Normal</summary>

 ```
@#@
#$#
@#@



@ = Lapis Lazuli
# = Compatable Food
$ = Book
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe Golden Apple/Carrot</summary>

```
@#@
#$#
@#@

@ = Lapis Lazuli Block
# = Compatable Food
$ = Book
```

</details>


</details>


<details>
<summary>❤️Rejuvination</summary>
Adds 1 second of instant health when you consume this enchanted food.


<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe</summary>

 ```
@#@
#$#
@#@



@ = Gold Ingot
# = Compatable Food
$ = Book
```

</details>


</details>


<details>
<summary>🍖 Curse of Gluttony</summary>
Food enchanted with this item cannot be dropped from your inventory. If you have eaten some of it, you will also not be able to move it from your inventory into another inventory such as a chest. Additionally, if you try to eat other food after having eaten some cursed food, it will give you an additional food item with the curse of gluttony.

Upon consumption you will gain hunger, and it will replace the item you consumed with another food item that also has curse of gluttony on it. You will have a 1/11 chance to get a food item that gives you a higher level of gluttony, and a 1/11 chance to get a food item that give syou a lower level of gluttony. At level 1, if you get a food item of a lower level, it will not be cursed and your journey will end. At level 5, instead of getting a food item at level 6, it will just kill you. 

Higher levels of gluttony will give you more side effects, such as higher hunger, nausea, and poison.


<details>
<summary>Crafting Gluttony Level 1</summary>

 ```
@#@
#$#
@#@



@ = Rotten Flesh
# = Poisonous Potato
$ = Book
```

To achieve book values of higher levels, simply combine the books in the anvil.
</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>🍏 Enchanted Golden Apple</summary>
You can now craft the enchanted golden apple using the following recipe:

 ```
@#@
#$#
@#@



@ = Gold Blocks
# = Any Combination of Enchanted Books
$ = Golden Apple
```

</details>

### Commands


<details>
<summary>Troubleshooting - Functions </summary>

```
/function enchf:reset_advancements - If an advancement is broken
/function enchf:reset_gluttony_punishment - If gluttony punishment advancement is broken
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Troubleshooting - Tags </summary>

```
/tag name add|remove gluttonyCurse - Resetting the curse
/tag name add|remove chestopen - Fixing if the chestopen tag is not working
```

</details>
